div.style: color: rgb(31, 60, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Onboarding is separate from hosted billing: a community can subscribe to a hosted
plan without ever connecting payouts. This flow only applies once payout
onboarding is explicitly requested.

div.style: color: rgb(35, 24, 13) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Community or Person requests
payout onboarding

div.style: color: rgb(35, 24, 13) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CreateOnboardingLink
finds or creates the merchant account

div.style: color: rgb(18, 48, 75) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Provisions a Stripe Connect Express account
(or reuses the existing one)

div.style: color: rgb(35, 24, 13) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SyncAccount
writes initial status to Billing::MerchantAccount

div.style: color: rgb(18, 48, 75) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Stripe returns a hosted onboarding link

div.style: color: rgb(35, 24, 13) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Owner completes identity, banking,
and business details on Stripe

div.style: color: rgb(18, 48, 75) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Stripe redirects back to refresh_url / return_url

div.style: color: rgb(35, 24, 13) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RefreshAccount
re-pulls the account from Stripe

div.style: color: rgb(35, 24, 13) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SyncAccount
maps requirements + capability flags to status

div.style: color: rgb(91, 61, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(31, 60, 26) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
status: active
ready to receive payouts

div.style: color: rgb(74, 20, 20) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
status: required_action / pending / onboarding
still missing information

div.style: color: rgb(31, 60, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(35, 24, 13) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
